text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fan letter addressed to Kitasan Black has
arrived, so I go to hand it to her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I got a fan letter?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy! Can I read it now? Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Watching you run was so exciting, it made me
want to try my best too! I just love you!"

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Aww... Reading this makes me feel so nostalgic!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Well, the thing is, I've written fan letters before.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: "Dear Teio..."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"I love watching your races! They're so fun and
exciting!"

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Also, hmm.. What else I should say?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
At that time, I had so many feelings I wanted to
convey that I didn't know what to write.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I managed to write even half of what
I wanted to say...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It frustrated me that all I could do was give her a
few measly words of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But I guess that wasn't the case at all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I mean that this letter helped me realize
something!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This fan spent so much of their precious time
thinking about me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And I can feel all their love and support through
the words written here.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks to them, I'm at full power now!
What's that? You look excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you're that full of energy, why don't you come
train with me? I feel like going for a run!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Count me in! I'm feeling like a different person
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the letter, Kitasan Black is filled with
motivation and pushes herself even harder during
her training.
